pick.rationale: Texas Tech holds significantly superior advanced metrics as a top-20 team ranked 12th in Torvik and 19th in KenPom compared to Akron's 68th/64th rankings. The Red Raiders' elite offensive rating ranked 9th-12th nationally at 125-126 adjO versus Akron's 52nd-60th ranked 117-119 adjO, combined with a substantially better efficiency margin (+25.19 vs +13.02), creates a clear advantage. In a classic 5/12 seed matchup where five seeds historically win approximately 70-75% of the time, Texas Tech's Big 12 pedigree, superior talent depth, and dominant performance across every metric make them the heavy favorite to advance past the MAC champion.

reasoningStep.title: Advanced Metrics Comparison
reasoningStep.summary: Compared Texas Tech and Akron using Bart Torvik and KenPom ratings to identify performance gaps.
reasoningStep.evidence: Texas Tech: Torvik rank 12th, KenPom rank 19th, AdjO 125-126 (top 12 nationally), AdjD 98-99 (top 30), Eff Margin +25.19. Akron: Torvik rank 68th, KenPom rank 64th, AdjO 117-119 (52nd-60th), AdjD 105-106 (99th-100th), Eff Margin +13.02. 12-point efficiency margin gap favors Texas Tech significantly.

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.
Bracket config id: demo-2026-bracket
Tournament year: 2026
Current game id: r64-midwest-3
Current game label: Midwest 5/12
Round: Round of 64
Resolved teams: Texas Tech (texas-tech) vs Akron (akron)
Prior committed picks: 30

I need to predict the winner of the current game: r64-midwest-3, which is a Midwest 5/12 seed matchup between Texas Tech (texas-tech) and Akron (akron).

Let me gather relevant information about both teams before making my pick. I should:
1. Look up their CBB ratings (KenPom/Torvik)
2. Search for any recent news about injuries or team status
3. Consider historical 5/12 seed matchup patterns

Let me start by looking up the ratings for both teams.

Great! Now I have the ratings for both teams:

Texas Tech (5-seed):
- Torvik rank: 12th, KenPom rank: 19th
- Record: 22-10
- Conference: Big 12
- AdjO: 126.3 (Torvik) / 125.1 (KenPom), ranked 9th/12th nationally
- AdjD: 98.8 (Torvik) / 99.9 (KenPom), ranked 27th/30th nationally
- Efficiency margin: +25.19 (KenPom)

Akron (12-seed):
- Torvik rank: 68th, KenPom rank: 64th
- Record: 28-5
- Conference: MAC
- AdjO: 117.4 (Torvik) / 119.1 (KenPom), ranked 60th/52nd nationally
- AdjD: 105.2 (Torvik) / 106.1 (KenPom), ranked 99th/100th nationally
- Efficiency margin: +13.02 (KenPom)

The gap is significant - Texas Tech is a top-20 team with elite offensive production and solid defense, while Akron is a mid-major champion with decent but not elite metrics. The efficiency margin difference is about 12 points (+25.19 vs +13.02).

Historically, 5-seeds win approximately 70-75% of matchups against 12-seeds. This is a classic 5/12 matchup where the higher seed should prevail.

Let me search for any injury news or recent developments that might affect this game.
